c74object.name: lazyvst~
c74object.description: The `lazyvst~` object takes an absolute file path to a VST plugin (64-bit Windows .dll) as its first argument. Upon creation, it identifies the file, posts metadata such as size and attributes, and instantiates the plugin to retrieve and post its internal Effect Name (as it would appear in a title bar) directly to the Max console.

inlet.description: The first inlet accepts signals and control messages. Subsequent inlets are signal-only and correspond to the VST's audio inputs.

outlet.description: The outlets correspond to the VST's audio outputs.

argument.name: path
argument.digest: Absolute path to the VST plugin

method.name: open
method.digest: Open the VST plugin's GUI editor window
method.description: The open message opens the graphical user interface (GUI) of the VST plugin in a separate Win32 window. This requires that the VST plugin has an editor available. If the editor is already open, it brings the window to the front.

method.name: snapshot
method.description: The snapshot message followed by an absolute path to a .maxsnap file will load the VST's state from that file. This operation is deferred to the main thread for safety.

method.name: list
method.description: A list in the first inlet where the first element is the parameter number (1-indexed) and the second element is the value (float 0.0 to 1.0) will set the corresponding parameter in the VST plugin.

method.name: vst
method.description: Directly send an opcode, index, and value to the VST plugin's dispatcher.

method.name: getchunk
method.digest: Get the current VST state chunk
method.description: Retrieves the current state chunk from the VST. An optional argument (0 or 1) specifies whether to get the bank chunk (0) or program chunk (1). The chunk data is posted to the Max console.

method.name: vstinfo
method.description: Posts metadata about the current VST instance, including sample rate, block size, unique ID, and version, to the Max console.

method.name: vstlist
method.description: Iterates through all parameters of the VST and posts their index, name, current display value, label, and raw float value to the Max console.

method.name: vstdebug
method.description: Enables (1) or disables (0) verbose logging of calls made by the plugin to the host.

method.name: bang
method.description: Posts a "bang received" message to the Max console.
